name: Free Online Word/Excel/PDF Metadata Editor - Pure Tools
description: Edit metadata in Word (DOCX), Excel (XLSX) and PDF: creation/modification time, author, title, keywords, company/manager, and custom properties. Runs locally in your browser.
seoDescription: Free online Word (DOCX) / Excel (XLSX) / PDF metadata editor. View and edit common document properties such as creation time, modification time, author, title, subject, keywords, and description. Also supports Office extended properties (company, manager) and custom properties. Everything runs locally in your browser with no file uploads, ideal for privacy cleanup before sharing and for document metadata normalization.
